title: Makima Totem
description: This resours pack changes the totem's appearance and turns it into Makima from the anime "Chainsaw Man"
body: This resource pack changes the appearance of the totem and transforms it into **Makima** from the anime _Chainsaw Man_. It adds a unique and stylish touch to your gameplay, making every near-death experience feel more intense and thematic. Perfect for fans of the series who want to bring a bit of anime atmosphere into Minecraft, this pack keeps the original functionality while giving it a fresh and recognizable look.
